insight: Spider wall-climbing cannot be disabled via Bukkit/Paper API — it's hardcoded in NMS Spider.move(). Mob jumping for non-horse entities is also NMS-controlled (JUMP_STRENGTH attribute only affects horses/llamas); Paper's EntityJumpEvent is cancellable but doesn't cover spiders. Boss has no Prevent_Climbing/Prevent_Jumping settings, and NO_AI freezes the entity entirely rather than selectively blocking movement abilities.
